description_long: This kiosk features a compact, angular structure with a prominent display screen mounted at the top, framed in white and showcasing an artistic image. The main body is constructed from a combination of metallic silver and deep red panels, with decorative floral motifs embossed on the sides. The kiosk has a recessed central compartment, likely for interaction or transaction, and a sturdy base for stability. The front area is open, allowing access to the interior, while the sides are partially enclosed with geometric cutouts. The overall design is modern with ornamental touches, and the materials suggest durability for outdoor urban use. The kiosk's clean lines and contrasting colors make it visually striking and functional for public environments.
description: A modern, metallic kiosk with a large framed display screen, deep red and silver panels, and decorative floral side motifs. The open front and sturdy base make it suitable for urban public use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen, open access area, and decorative panel beneath the screen.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the embossed floral motif, angular structure, and the depth of the display screen.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the kiosk's back panel, the depth of the recessed compartment, and the solid base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible floral motif and angular design.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into the top display screen, featuring an artistic image with no visible text
attribute_roof_design: flat roof formed by the top display screen, with a slight overhang and glossy finish
